title: Bulk update items via import matching on Item ID
excerpt: Current system doesn’t support matching by Item ID during the import. This means the match functionality doesn’t recognize the Item ID column, and if there are duplicate item names, updates will need to be done manually. …

posts.author: Harj (Harj Gadhvi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Current system doesn’t support matching by Item ID during the import. This means the match functionality doesn’t recognize the Item ID column, and if there are duplicate item names, updates will need to be done manually.

It is crucial to be able to bulk update items via import matching on the Item ID field
